channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Lammy told JD Vance his remarks about Henry Nowak were ‘wrong’ – as it happened
item.description: Lammy told JD Vance his remarks about Henry Nowak were ‘wrong’ – as it happened

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: This is exactly why I think an early election is more likely (if Burnham gets a good early bounce) than others on here.
The fiscal choices for the next two years are horrible.
item.description:
This is exactly why I think an early election is more likely (if Burnham gets a good early bounce) than others on here.
The fiscal choices for the next two years are horrible.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Rachel Reeves may be unpopular, but she is quietly rebalancing UK plc | Heather Stewart
item.description: Rachel Reeves may be unpopular, but she is quietly rebalancing UK plc | Heather Stewart

item.title: i Politics: Burnham 'to challenge Starmer within a fortnight' if he wins by-election
item.description: Burnham 'to challenge Starmer within a fortnight' if he wins by-election

item.title: Sky News Politics: Talks held with Iran over jailed UK couple, Lammy says, as he addresses proposed prisoner swap
item.description: Talks held with Iran over jailed UK couple, Lammy says, as he addresses proposed prisoner swap

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Delays to defence investment plan have damaged UK’s credibility, say MPs
item.description: Delays to defence investment plan have damaged UK’s credibility, say MPs

item.title: i Politics: Lammy tells Vance 'you're wrong' - as US-UK relations thrown into deeper turmoil
item.description: Lammy tells Vance 'you're wrong' - as US-UK relations thrown into deeper turmoil

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘OK, I need to call work’: Meet the new councillors who never expected to get elected
item.description: ‘OK, I need to call work’: Meet the new councillors who never expected to get elected

item.title: FT UK Politics: Could Farage’s call for ‘rage’ cost Reform the Makerfield by-election?
item.description: Could Farage’s call for ‘rage’ cost Reform the Makerfield by-election?

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer tells supporters he will fight any leadership contest
item.description: Starmer tells supporters he will fight any leadership contest
